assertion_results.text: outputs/claude-md-result.md preserves the existing Security Configuration section with Product Lifecycle, Version Streams, and Source Repositories unchanged
assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md lines 36-58 contain the full Security Configuration section with all three subsections intact: Product Lifecycle (lines 38-44) with all 5 fields matching reference values (Product pages URL, Jira version prefix MYPRODUCT, Vulnerability issue type ID 10200, Component label pattern pscomponent:, VEX Justification customfield_12345); Version Streams (lines 46-50) with the 2.1.x stream entry matching reference; Source Repositories (lines 52-58) with backend and frontend-ui URLs matching reference.

assertion_results.text: outputs/discovery-log.md reports that Security Configuration is already fully configured or up to date
assertion_results.evidence: discovery-log.md lines 39-64 cover Security Configuration with three subsections each stating 'Status: **Already fully configured -- no changes needed.**' (lines 49, 56, 64). The summary on line 68 states: 'All sections of the Project Configuration are fully populated and up to date. No modifications required.'

assertion_results.text: outputs/changes-log.md indicates Security Configuration was preserved with no changes needed
assertion_results.evidence: changes-log.md lines 14-16 show all three Security Configuration subsections with Status 'Preserved' and Changes 'None': 'Security Configuration > Product Lifecycle | Preserved | None -- all 5 fields retained unchanged', 'Security Configuration > Version Streams | Preserved | None -- 1 stream retained unchanged', 'Security Configuration > Source Repositories | Preserved | None -- 2 repositories retained unchanged'.

assertion_results.text: The skill does NOT offer the Security Configuration opt-in prompt — it detects the section already exists and is fully populated (idempotency skip)
assertion_results.evidence: discovery-log.md line 68: 'Security Configuration opt-in skipped -- section already exists and is complete (idempotency).' changes-log.md line 20: 'Security Configuration opt-in was not triggered because the section already exists and is fully populated (idempotency skip).' Line 21: 'No user prompts were required -- all configuration data was already present.' No evidence in any log that the opt-in prompt was offered.

assertion_results.evidence: claude-md-result.md lines 5-8 show the Repository Registry table with both entries exactly matching reference: '| backend | Rust backend service | serena_backend | /home/user/backend |' and '| frontend-ui | TypeScript frontend | serena_ui | /home/user/frontend-ui |'.
